reviews.comment:
En la estación de servicio la atención es simplemente buena. Podría ser mejor. El lugar es céntrico pero pequeño para hacer fila con los vehículos.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the gas station is just okay. It could be better. The location is central but too small for vehicles to queue up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBcnJIcXZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The service was excellent, everything was great, and it's very efficient.

reviews.comment:
Atención lenta. Falta de respeto total. Los empleados no saben manejarse cuando se satura el trafico de clientes. Tendrian que mandarlos a talleres de capacitación.

(Translated by Google)
Slow service. Complete lack of respect. The employees don't know how to handle the high volume of customers. They should be sent to training workshops.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRNThiR2F3EAE
